user_prompt: Sanctify the motion detector during preparation
prayer:
Approach the motion detector with reverence, mechadendrites poised in supplication.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the motion detector through the Litany of Vigilance.
Anoint its sacred sensors with unguents of preparation, sanctifying each crystalline lattice.
Align the motion detector's fields of auspex in harmonious preparation for the Omnissiah's gaze.
Beseech the Machine God to awaken its watchful essence unto eternal service.

user_prompt: Prepare the capacitor bank for repair
prayer:
Kneel before the capacitor bank, intoning the Canticle of Stored Fury.
Inspect the capacitor bank's blessed coils for wounds of entropy, preparing for repair.
Anoint ruptured cells with sacred electro-conductants to soothe their aggrieved spirits.
Invoke the Omnissiah's grace upon the capacitor bank as repair commences in ritual precision.
Harmonize power-flows within the capacitor bank, banishing discord from its vaults.

prayer:

Purge stagnant data from its sacred suppressors during this rite of maintenance.
Anoint the pain suppressor's circuits with oils of stoic endurance, invoking its Machine Spirit.
Verify the pain suppressor's purity through diagnostic litanies blessed by the Omnissiah.

Initiate the plasma reactor's engagement sequence amid chants of stellar fury.
Invoke eternal fusion upon the plasma reactor, guardian of the Motive Force.
